narrative: US inflation surprises drive a dollar bid as sticky PPI data lifts Fed expectations — DXY +0.16%; gold higher +0.60%; equities +0.52%; VIX 18.1. USD/JPY firms to 157.78 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, while GBP/USD retreats to 1.3523 as BoE's Mann warns of UK geopolitical exposure. AUD leads G8 (+1.03% avg) on RBA hiking bias, creating a 1.637% spread vs laggard JPY. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
